name: myagency
description: Personal data engineering consulting toolkit: core working method, deliverable contracts, and per-stack technology packs.

plugins.name: de-core
plugins.description: Core DE consulting toolkit: working method, engineering practices, and client deliverable contracts. Install in every engagement.

plugins.name: de-clickhouse
plugins.description: ClickHouse stack pack: official read-only MCP, vendor skill pointers, consulting gotchas. Install on ClickHouse engagements.

plugins.name: de-starrocks
plugins.description: StarRocks stack pack (full): first-party idioms, diagnosis, and operations skills plus official MCP config. Install on StarRocks engagements.

plugins.name: de-airflow
plugins.description: Airflow stack pack: Astronomer read-only MCP, vendor skill pointers, consulting gotchas, DAG safety hooks. Install on Airflow engagements.

plugins.name: de-postgres
plugins.description: PostgreSQL stack pack: Postgres MCP Pro in restricted mode, pg-aiguide pointers, source-system consulting gotchas. Install on PostgreSQL engagements.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: General-purpose investigation method and RES-NNN record system: context-bound alternatives, annotated references, decisions with implementation tracking. Domain-agnostic.
